codeReview.summary: The auth pages implementation matches the feature description and expected behavior: login/register/forgot-password forms use react-hook-form + zod, redirect-back is implemented via AuthGuard and login redirect handling, and a catch-all 404 page is wired in routing. I found no blocking or non-blocking defects in the reviewed commit relative to the stated requirements.

summary: Reviewed handoff, commit a1a3994 diff, transcript skeleton, and fullstack-worker skill context for auth-pages-ui. Implementation satisfies the required auth page flows and redirect behavior, and no review issues were identified.
